creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Sat Aug  4 21:48:24 2012
New Revision: 302034
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302034

Log:
  - Update to 0.4.5
  - pass maintainership to submitter
  - Remove LICENCE_FILE in favor of bsd.licenses.db.mk license
  - Update and sort pkg-plist
  
  PR:	ports/170364
  Submitted by:	koobs.freebsd@gmail.com

Modified:
  head/sysutils/py-nagiosplugin/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/py-nagiosplugin/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/py-nagiosplugin/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/py-nagiosplugin/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-nagiosplugin/Makefile	Sat Aug  4 20:41:44 2012	(r302033)
+++ head/sysutils/py-nagiosplugin/Makefile	Sat Aug  4 21:48:24 2012	(r302034)
@@ -6,16 +6,15 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	nagiosplugin
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.4
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.5
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Class library for writing Nagios (Icinga) plugins
 
 LICENSE=	ZPL21
-LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/LICENSE.txt
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
